g.text: Contention & Backoff Strategies: Cache Coherency Performance
Architectural Analysis of Spinning vs. Exponential Backoff

div.p: Each Compare-and-Swap (CAS) on a contended address:

ol.li: RFO (Request For Ownership): Broadcasts invalidation to all L1 caches.
MESI Transition: Forced transition from Shared (S) or Exclusive (E) to Invalid (I) on other cores.
Pipeline Stall: The local core stalls until all Acks return.

div.p: O(N²) Traffic: With N threads, total bus messages grow quadratically, saturating the ring interconnect/mesh.

ul.li: Yields execution units to HT sibling.
Prevents memory order violation on exit.
Saves power by reducing freq of loop.
